input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.11.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.11.4.1
            TITLE: the following work activities at competition are allowed only in the designated area and

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.11.4.1: The following work activities at competition are allowed only in the designated area and
EV.11.4.1 The following work activities at competition are allowed only in the designated area and 
during Electrical Technical Inspection IN.4   See EV.5.3.3 
a. Opening Accumulator Containers 
b. Any work on Accumulators, cells, or Segments 
c. Energized electrical work

final_answer: rule EV.11.4.1: The following work activities at competition are allowed only in the designated area and during Electrical Technical Inspection IN.4 See EV.5.3.3 a. Opening Accumulator Containers b. Any work on Accumulators, cells, or Segments c. Energized electrical work
